keyEvents.text: Goal!  Guadeloupe 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Matthias Phaëton (Guadeloupe) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Junior Senneville.
Omari Sterling-James (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Andre Burley (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Matthias Phaëton (Guadeloupe) is shown the yellow card.
First Half ends, Guadeloupe 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 0.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Ronaldo Belgrove replaces Diego Edwards.
Second Half begins Guadeloupe 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 0.
Harry Panayiotou (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Taïryk Arconte replaces Luther Archimède.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Morgan Saint-Maximin replaces Jordan Leborgne.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Kimaree Rogers replaces Ezrick Nicholls because of an injury.
Goal!  Guadeloupe 2, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Taïryk Arconte (Guadeloupe) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner    following a corner.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Kilian Bevis replaces Marcus Coco.
Goal!  Guadeloupe 3, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Kilian Bevis (Guadeloupe) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Matthias Phaëton.
Goal!  Guadeloupe 4, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Jérôme Roussillon (Guadeloupe) left footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Taïryk Arconte.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Nathanaël Saintini replaces Mickaël Alphonse.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Hans Dezac replaces Ange-Freddy Plumain.

Goal!  Guadeloupe 5, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Taïryk Arconte (Guadeloupe) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Jérôme Roussillon with a through ball   following a fast break.
Taïryk Arconte (Guadeloupe) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
